body: This PR removes `always_inline = false` in the fused kernel, as this conflicts with the threads specified through the occupancy API call. Found in [this build](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-target-gpu-simulations/builds/387#01932b17-b36a-4dc2-969f-8d0ac5ad27e4)
title: Remove always_inline = false in fused kernel
